text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, heya! ♪ I feel like I see you pretty often these days.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
They're having a scrimmage on the course down there right now! I was
just watching 'cause I can't run in any races.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Maaan, I wish I could race toooo. But y'know...
choice_data_list: You really don't want to train, right?
You really don't want to train, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ... I don't.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: They told me I had to train, so I went the first time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But they only did stuff that was super easy to pick up. Everything took
me only one try to get, and doing stuff I already got is booooring,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And what's the point if it's boring?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mayano Top Gun is incredibly quick to learn and apply her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it appears that everything she's accomplished thus far has been
through talent rather than effort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She never had the need to work hard, so to her, training must be
nothing more than another tedious task to check off her list.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I think I'm too good to train or anything... I see Yukipe
and everybody else training, so I get that it's important.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, even City and Tamamo train every single day! They all do! I
get it...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But no matter what I do, it's so boring! It always feels so pointless...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Am I weird for thinking like this? Does this mean I'll never become a
twinkly racer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! N-no need to shout, y'know...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think you were the type to raise your voice, since you look so
nice and everything...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, do you think I should train too?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll do it, but only if you listen to what I say.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Weeell... ♪ I was thinking...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: How about you and I go on a date?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day, in front of the station...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And we have touchdooown! Sorry for the wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks for coming with me today. I wanted to go on a date
and see what being a grown-up feels like! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All right then! So where should we go first?! We have to go shopping
at one of those fancy stores. Oh, and we can't forget about making a
stop for sweets!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And then we can watch a romantic movie! And then we can visit an expensive cafe—one of those grown-up ones! Ahhh, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, we gotta get going! We're wasting time just standing around
here. C'mon, let's hurry up and take off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She jets off with a blast, dragging me behind her. At the rate we're
going, I'm sure we could cover the entire city by the end of the day.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look at that T-shirt over there! Isn't it so cute? And isn't that a juice
stand?! I wonder if they have carrot juice!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sniff, sniff... Something smells really good... I think it's coming from that way. Let's go check it out!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey! No zoning out while you're with me! We still have so many things
to do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So what should we watch? Hmmm, they all look fun! Wait, whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that movie trailer showed a kiss scene! And I saw it! Oh my
gosh, I'm blushing...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How many scoops of ice cream can I get? One? Two? Three?
Obviously three, right?! Of course it's three!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What flavors should I pick? Strawberry looks good, so I'll have that...
and vanilla too. Oooh, and some chocolate chip cookie too...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait, the cheesecake one is limited-time only?! ...Hey, can I get four
scoops?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the day, Mayano Top Gun dragged me around from
place to place in order to make the most of her date.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gosh, that was fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say though. I'm surprised you could keep up with me! You're
probably the first person other than Marvey who can keep up with me
at my max!
choice_data_list:
I thought I was going to pass out towards the
end there...

I thought I was going to pass out towards the
end there...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Really?! Does that mean you stayed awake just for me? Glad
to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how come you're so nice anyway? Like, why'd you even agree to
go out on a date with me?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Is it 'cause I promised to train if you listened to what I say?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What do you mean "not exactly"? You mean you didn't come with me 'cause you wanted me to train?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If that's not why, then how come you're here?
choice_data_list: I don't want you to give up on your dreams.
I don't want you to give up on your dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Dreams?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: My... dreams?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if deep in thought, Mayano Top Gun quiets down for what seems
to be the first time—ever. Then...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So that's why...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Anyway, thanks again for today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's do our training tomorrow, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, at long last, I've convinced her to train under me!
